systems.system_notes: Forearm locking plate family covering radius and ulna fixation within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique resources describe dedicated forearm plating instrumentation for radius and ulna fixation.

components.component_notes: Official catalogue and technique materials identify radius plate options within the LCP forearm family.
Official catalogue and technique materials identify ulna plate options within the LCP forearm family.
Official technique materials describe locking and cortex screw fixation used with the LCP forearm plating constructs.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the LCP forearm plate family and technique references but do not expose a full normalized product-code matrix in this pass.
